releaseNotes:
- Lunaverse Agent can now inspect which assets actually exist on disk and submit one exact production order for image, audio, video, and minigame assets
- Creating missing assets and regenerating existing ones now share one production flow with live progress, cancellation, verified delivery, and version history
- CG generation now identifies the cast and location at each scene, using the matching character portraits and background as visual references for more consistent results
- The Gallery now offers a compact style selector; Style Studio adds a dedicated Event CG category, and inherited reference images can be removed for individual assets
- Lunaverse Agent now exposes reasoning strength alongside model selection, with High as the default and per-run control when a task needs more or less deliberation
- The Villain Season sample now has a dedicated actions menu for creating a new book from the sample or resetting the sample to its original state
- Windows users can now choose a compatible local drive for the Lunaverse workspace, with verified copy-and-switch migration that keeps the original workspace as a safety copy
releaseNotesZh:
- Lunaverse Agent 现可检查素材是否已真实落盘，并为图片、音频、视频和小游戏提交一次精确生产订单
- 补齐缺失素材与重新生成现已统一为同一生产流程，支持实时进度、取消、交付校验和版本历史
- CG 生成现会识别每个场景中的出场角色与地点，并自动采用对应角色立绘和背景作为视觉参考，使画面更连贯一致
- 画廊新增紧凑的风格选择器；风格工作室新增独立的“事件 CG”分类，并支持为单个素材移除继承的参考图
- Lunaverse Agent 现可在模型选择旁调整推理强度，默认使用“高”，也可按任务需要选择更多或更少的思考
- Villain Season 样书新增专属操作菜单，可直接基于样书新建书籍，或将样书恢复到初始状态
- Windows 用户现可为 Lunaverse workspace 选择兼容的本地磁盘；迁移会在校验复制结果后再切换，并保留原 workspace 作为安全副本
